findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: wubble_get_dubbing_transcript · Public sink: wubble_upload_audio, wubble_upload_vocal.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: wubble_get_dubbing_transcript · Public sink: wubble_upload_audio, wubble_upload_vocal

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
